summary: Iteration 322: Enhanced Social Proof / Momentum-Based Data Testing Complete. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%) after fixing is_alive boolean bug. Frontend: All momentum features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: is_alive in public_routes.py was returning None instead of boolean when no continuations exist. Added bool() wrapper to both creation and character endpoints.
Backend momentum fields properly implemented: last_continuation_at, continuations_1h, continuations_24h, is_trending, is_alive
Character Power Score properly shows: total_stories, total_continuations, tools_used, is_alive
Trending badge correctly NOT shown when is_trending=false (thresholds: continuations_1h>=2 OR (continuations_24h>=5 AND views>=20))
context_for_next_testing_agent: Momentum-based social proof fully implemented. Backend returns proper boolean values for is_alive and is_trending. Frontend correctly displays momentum messages (amber for dormant, green for alive), 'Continue where others left off' CTA, and trending badge only when thresholds met.

Backend_APIs.GET_public_creation_momentum: VERIFIED - Returns last_continuation_at, continuations_1h, continuations_24h, is_trending (bool), is_alive (bool)
Backend_APIs.GET_public_character_power_score: VERIFIED - Returns total_stories=5, total_continuations, last_continuation_at, tools_used, is_alive
Backend_APIs.is_trending_false_threshold: VERIFIED - is_trending=false when continuations_1h<2 AND (continuations_24h<5 OR views<20)

Frontend_PublicCreation.momentum_msg: VERIFIED - Shows 'Be the first to continue this story today' in amber color (dormant)
Frontend_PublicCreation.continue_others_btn: VERIFIED - Shows 'Continue where others left off' with '9 people already continued'
Frontend_PublicCreation.create_own_removed: VERIFIED - 'Create your own' CTA is GONE
Frontend_PublicCreation.trending_badge_hidden: VERIFIED - Trending badge NOT shown when is_trending=false
Frontend_PublicCreation.social_proof: VERIFIED - Shows views and continuations count

Frontend_PublicCharacterPage.momentum_line: VERIFIED - Shows 'Be the first to write Finn's next chapter' in slate color
Frontend_PublicCharacterPage.continue_others_cta: VERIFIED - Shows 'Continue where others left off' with 'Add your chapter — no signup needed'
Frontend_PublicCharacterPage.continue_story_cta: VERIFIED - Shows 'Continue Finn's Story' primary CTA

bug_fixed.issue: is_alive returned None instead of boolean when no continuations exist
bug_fixed.root_cause: Python short-circuit evaluation: `continuations_24h > 0 or (last_continuation_at and ...)` returns None when first condition is False and last_continuation_at is None
bug_fixed.fix: Wrapped expression with bool() in both get_public_creation and get_public_character endpoints
